subject: update dcae released version
commit_message:
update dcae released version

Change-Id: I4fa40e2cf02bcdc3482bc76362c20891158ccd88
Signed-off-by: Vijay Venkatesh Kumar <vv770d@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1669
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-1718

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange: Chained CI build failure on some jobs.
Jobs with issue:
- Step: apps_deploy "* Project: oom "* Status: failed "* Pipeline: 'https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//pipelines/75265124' "* API pipeline url: 'https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/6550110/pipelines/75265124' "* Failed jobs: "*   - id: 268102589 "*     name: clean/clean "*     status: failed "*     duration: 88.530357 "*     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/268102589 "*   - id: 268103469 "*     name: clean/clean "*     status: failed "*     duration: 89.116012 "*     link: https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/onap_oom_automatic_installation//-/jobs/268103469 "
Uploaded patch set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 2:

corresponding master updates are covered under this patch - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/oom/+/92618/

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 2:

oom/staging can stay on snapshot if you want it to pick up newer snapshots on the daily install ?

Patch Set 2:

The snapshot version will need to be bumped up; will do that separate change later. This change now will help to validate ED release tag on staging before master is merged.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

LF issue with tagging of release images in nexus3

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange: Chained-CI build too long. Aborting.

Patch Set 2:

The images tag issue has been fixed by LF; all updated images/tag are released.

Patch Set 2:

Deployment results below from DCAE tenant. 
Except ServiceChangeHandler and Policyhandler (which are in ini-t due to missing dependency) all DCAE components are up.
